title: Curaleaf posts $70M profit as international cannabis revenue hits $47M
text: Curaleaf Holdings reported Q1 2026 results posting $70 million in net income as international cannabis revenue reached $47 million. This represents a significant turnaround from the prior year loss. The company's international revenue growth of 35% year-over-year demonstrates the success of its multi-country expansion strategy. The company maintained a 49% gross profit margin despite domestic market pressures. The return to profitability in Q1 2026 marks a critical inflection point for the company after several years of losses and margin compression. International operations now represent a substantial portion of the company's growth profile, with Germany and UK operations performing particularly well. Management attributes the profitability turnaround to margin expansion initiatives, operational efficiency gains, and the contribution of higher-margin international revenue. The company's focus on international markets has paid off, providing a counterbalance to domestic market headwinds.
